user.title: Set up FruitForest
user.description: Choose the Echo media players that should appear in Shortcuts. FruitForest uses each device's Home Assistant Area as its room name. Keep the generated webhook ID private.

error.echo_required: Choose at least one Echo device.
error.webhook_too_short: Use a webhook ID containing at least 16 characters.

devices.title: Choose Echo devices
devices.description: Enabled devices appear automatically in both FruitForest Shortcuts. Their room names come from Home Assistant Areas.

add_group.title: Add or update an Alexa group
add_group.description: Enter the group name exactly as it appears in the Alexa app. The carrier is a reliably powered Echo that sends the typed group command.

abort.no_groups: There are no Alexa groups to remove.

init.add_group: Add or update an Alexa group

play.name: Play on Echo
play.description: Send an Apple Music request to a configured FruitForest destination.

kind.name: Kind
kind.description: Track, album, playlist, or freeform request.

title.name: Title
title.description: Track, album, or freeform request text.

artist.name: Artist
artist.description: Artist for a track or album.

target.name: Destination
target.description: FruitForest room or Alexa group name.

sender.name: Sender
sender.description: Optional Home Assistant companion-app notification slug.

get_targets.name: Get destinations
get_targets.description: Return the destinations currently available to FruitForest clients.
